### [Hexalith\.EventStore\.Contracts\.Events](Hexalith.EventStore.Contracts.Events.md 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Contracts\.Events')

## AggregateTerminated Class

Framework\-level rejection event persisted when a command targets a tombstoned aggregate \(FR66\)\.
Implements [IRejectionEvent](Hexalith.EventStore.Contracts.Events.IRejectionEvent.md 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Contracts\.Events\.IRejectionEvent') so the existing rejection path handles it automatically\.

